creator: freebsd.68fba@nospam.spacesurfer.com
text:
(In reply to Jonathan Chen from comment #12)

I have had successful builds with both 11 and 16, didn't get round to trying 17.

I just want to thank you for all your hard work, I may have helped a bit but the vast majority of the work was yours. I have been using the eclipse port on FreeBSD for years and am very grateful to you for maintaining it.
